properties.address: 1766 WEST PACES FERRY RD NW, ATLANTA GA 30327

properties.tree_description: 24" DBH Oak situated at the rear property line (on the neighbor's side). The specimen features a large canopy and an aggressive lateral root system. The main trunk is positioned in extreme proximity to the residence, growing directly against the brick masonry corner of the home.Reason for Removal:Uncorrectable defectComments:This tree poses a severe structural hazard to my property. Its lateral roots have encroached upon the foundation wall and completely heaved the concrete pad of the primary HVAC unit, causing a significant tilt and stress on mechanical lines. Any root pruning to level the pad or protect the foundation would sever major anchoring roots within the critical root plate, causing severe stability loss and windthrow risk. The defect is uncorrectable under Section 158-26.
